summary: Airflow local read paths now open SQLite in read-only mode, and the bearer-token TOML key matches AIRFLOW_ADMIN_BEARER_AUTH.
reason: Review identified that openStoreForRead used the write/migration open path and that manual config files using airflow_admin_bearer_auth were ignored because the TOML tag was admin_bearer_auth.
validated_outcome: Focused tests passed: go test ./internal/cli -run TestOpenStoreForReadUsesReadOnlyHandle -count=1 and go test ./internal/config -count=1.
